title: Marketplace Manager - More Retail - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - More Retail - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the More Retail family as a Marketplace Manager in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About More Retail:
More Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail!
